title: Diamond­ Tools and Machines
description: ... under this guiding principle, the CEDIMA GmbH has been developing and selling diamond tools and machines for the construction industry since 1984.Competent, qualified employees constantly ensure the high quality standard of our diamond tools and machines in terms of performance, reliability and economic efficiency. Thus, our company is committed to a continuous improvement process, the result of which guarantees the constant certification according to DIN EN ISO 9001:2015.
